Primary official source displays required date 2026-07-16. Verified.
title: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs detail bioresilience approach
summary: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs shared their joint approach to bioresilience, covering prevention, detection, and response to biological threats using AI. The program builds on AlphaFold, IsoDDE, and AlphaGenome, and includes 15+ partnerships with government and biosecurity groups over the past 12 months.
whyItMatters: Frames frontier AI as both a biosecurity safeguard and a misuse risk, and opens trusted-partner access to models for outbreak prevention, pathogen detection, and countermeasure response.
shareText: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs published their joint bioresilience approach: using AI for prevention, detection, and response to biological threats. Source: deepmind.google/blog/our-approach-to-bioresilience/
